channel.title: NAB Lapergue, A Lyoubi, E Meseguer, I Avram, C Denier, L Venditti, A Consoli, A Guedon, E Houdart, D Weisenburger-Lile, M Piotin, B Maier, M Obadia, TDE Broucker | PlatCOVID

item.title: Large vessel stroke in six patients following SARS-CoV-2 infection: a retrospective case study series of acute thrombotic complications on stable underlying atherosclerotic disease.
